aboutMe: I am a passionate Full-Stack AI Engineer bridging the gap between heavy machine learning backends and premium front-end experiences. I prefer spending days to automate a 5-second task, but hey! Now I don't have to do it manually! WIN.

projects.title: AI Image Recognizer
projects.shortDesc: A full-stack, decoupled machine learning pipeline. Processes raw images through a custom YOLOv8 neural network.

projects.title: Model Ship Project
projects.shortDesc: A 3D rendering pipeline demonstrating advanced WebGL and Three.js physics capabilities.
